description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular form. The exterior is clad in reddish-brown brick, with large windows on the front facade and smaller windows on the sides and rear. The front features a single-car garage with a roll-up door, a main entry door with a small overhang, and a patch of green lawn adjacent to a paved driveway. The rear of the house has a double glass door and minimal window openings, while the sides are mostly solid brick with a few windows and doors. The interior layout is visible from above, showing multiple rooms and hallways, with wooden doors leading to each room.
description: A modern, two-story brick house with a flat roof, large front windows, a garage, and a main entry door with a small overhang. The design is clean and rectangular, with minimal ornamentation and a mix of paved and grassy exterior surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, main entry door with overhang, large windows, and a patch of green lawn.
description_view_1: Left side view with mostly solid brick wall, a single window, and a glimpse of the green lawn and driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a double glass door, a long horizontal window, and minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Right side view with a solid brick wall, a single window, and a small section of the driveway visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large front windows and minimal side/rear windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a single door, small overhang, and adjacent garage; no porch or decorative columns.
